meaning: n.钦巴龙(在匈牙利演奏吉卜赛乐曲的一种扬琴)
examples: The larger zither family includes such instruments as the Aeolian harp, autoharp, cimbalom, dulcimer, koto, and even the clavichord, harpsichord, and piano.
The edgy, metallic sound of the cimbalom throughout the piece also added grittiness.
He also makes heavy use of the cimbalom, a large box with metal strings that are struck with wooden hammers.
The recordings he made 45 years ago for Romanian Electrecord, with fiddle, accordion, bass and cimbalom (hammered dulcimer), have just been issued in the U.S. for the first time.
